DEFENDANT RENEE BOISVERT'S PETITION TO VACATE CONTRACTURAL ARBITARATION AWARD
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Richard Zuromski; 415-293-7966; Seifert Zuromski LLP; counsel for petitioner appearing via Zoom.
Rene Boisvert; 514-444-8420; defendant in pro per appearing via Zoom.

Mr. Boisvert contests the courts tentative ruling. The court informs Mr. Boisvert that he is not able to represent himself as the named defendant is MG2 LLC. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RENEE BOISVERT'S PETITION TO VACATE CONTRACTURAL ARBITARATION AWARD is DENIED. The Court notes that this petition is filed in pro per on behalf of a corporation. This petition is not supported by any law, argument or evidence that would warrant vacating the award.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)

Hearing held. Discussed, not argued. Court notes that there is also a PETITION TO VACATE CONTRACTURAL ARBITARATION AWARD filed by Defendant, Rene Boisvert. Court wishes to hear both the PETITION TO VACATE CONTRACTURAL ARBITARATION AWARD and Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment On It at the same time and coordinates a date and time with parties present to hear both petitions.

PETITIONER MAJUA & NOYON LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment On It and Petition to vacate is conitinued to January 6, 2025 at 9:30 a.m. Dept. 302. The Court sets Defendant Rene Boisvert's PETITION TO VACATE CONTRACTURAL ARBITARATION AWARD for January 6, 2025 at 9:30 a.m. Dept. 302.
